query:
INSERT INTO bundle_courses (bundleId, courseId, courseOrder) 
SELECT 1, id, 
  CASE 
    WHEN title = 'Old Testament Survey' THEN 0
    WHEN title = 'New Testament Survey' THEN 1
    WHEN title = 'Biblical Hermeneutics' THEN 2
  END
FROM courses 
WHERE title IN ('Old Testament Survey', 'New Testament Survey', 'Biblical Hermeneutics');
